title: Enchantment Lookup
description: You can use commands or the K key to lookup enchantment.
body:
**If main hand is holding enchanted book and pressing the K key,you can find out more information about enchantments the Enchanted Book.**  

> ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdf3b0a834b6c7409428228f4a0c10eca74103cd.png)  
  
**Or use the Command.**  

> ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f654f284bd8af7cfd5f5eaa8b81fbcc9654a0a7a.png)  
  
**If main hand is holding item and pressing the K key,you can find out information about enchantments in the Item.**  

> ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afca5aebd56b3b8e24ac12a0ca3412d6dd1cd7a2.png)
